title: Cycle
notReady: Enable the Cycle module from My account → Modules to get started.
disclaimer: Informational estimate — not contraception and not a diagnosis. If in doubt, talk to a clinician.

estimate.title: Next period
estimate.notEnough: Not enough regularity to estimate yet.
estimate.irregular: Cycles too irregular for a reliable estimate.

ring.j1hint: D1 = first day of the period
ring.noData: Start logging your periods to see where you are.

stacked.empty: No completed cycle to compare yet.
